content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

CREATE OR ALTER PROCEDURE silver.usp_silver_vehicle_registration
@year VARCHAR(4),
@month VARCHAR(2)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @create_sql_stmt NVARCHAR(MAX),
            @drop_sql_stmt NVARCHAR(MAX),
            @table_name NVARCHAR(100)
    
    -- Construir nombre de tabla
    SET @table_name = 'vehicle_registration_' + @year + '_' + @month
    
    -- Verificar si la tabla existe y eliminarla
    SET @drop_sql_stmt = '
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables 
               WHERE name = ''' + @table_name + ''' 
               AND schema_id = SCHEMA_ID(''silver''))
    BEGIN
        DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.' + @table_name + '
    END'
    
    PRINT('Eliminando tabla si existe...')
    PRINT(@drop_sql_stmt)
    EXEC sp_executesql @drop_sql_stmt;
    
    -- Crear la nueva tabla externa
    SET @create_sql_stmt = '
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver.' + @table_name + '
    WITH(
        DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
        LOCATION = ''silver/vehicle_registration/year=' + @year + '/month=' + @month + ''',
        FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
    )
    AS
        SELECT 
            vehicleId AS vehicle_id,
            locationId AS location_id,
            propietaryId AS propietary_id,
            dolVehicleId AS dol_vehicle_id,
            registrationDate AS registration_date
        FROM bronze.vw_vehicle_registration_csv
        WHERE year = ''' + @year + ''' AND month = ''' + @month + '''
    '
    
    PRINT('Creando tabla externa...')
    PRINT(@create_sql_stmt)
    EXEC sp_executesql @create_sql_stmt;
END 
GO

--DROP PROCEDURE silver.usp_silver_vehicle_registration;
